rows.label: tev016802_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Quentin about FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Quentin to tell you
more about data probes.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Quentin if anything is troubling him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0001
rows.name:
Our current system for expanding FrontierNet is to
display the pre-calculated optimal sites as markers
on the map for data probes to be placed at.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0002
rows.name:
But I understand that some FrontierNet data
probe placement sites can be quite difficult
for BLADEs on the ground to find.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0003
rows.name:
I get lots of requests to pick
more accessible placement sites.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0004
rows.name:
However, I'm already at the end of my rope just trying
to keep FrontierNet up and running. So I wish people
would stop asking for things I can't possibly do![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0007
rows.name:
I mainly do FrontierNet-related
system engineering work, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0008
rows.name:
Day after day after day, I pull overtime,
fighting endless battles with massive volumes
of data... Honestly, I'm at my breaking point.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0009
rows.name:
I mean, sure, I know we civilians
aren't out there putting our
lives on the line like BLADE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0010
rows.name:
And I know we're short handed!
I know all of that... But
what's rough is still rough.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0011
rows.name:
If this keeps up, I'm going to
burn out. *sigh* I'd better go
ask her for advice soon...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0019
rows.name:
Thanks to BLADE's efforts,
we've come to understand a
little bit more about Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0020
rows.name:
When we first landed here, we knew next to nothing
about the world outside our walls, and no one
was sure that we'd even be able to survive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0021
rows.name:
That's what spurred us to develop the upgraded,
information-gathering data probes known as "research
probes"—and why we made that data viewable to all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0022
rows.name:
Now everyone can use FrontierNet to learn
about Mira, and scientists can put its
data to good use in their research.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0023
rows.name:
It's a major pain to manage the vast quantity of data
the probes are collecting, but at least the value we're
getting out of it makes the trouble worthwhile.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Quentin about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0024
rows.name:
So I hear that you and Himeri
have gotten pretty...close.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0025
rows.name:
You know she belongs to all
of us, right? It isn't fair
for you to monopolize her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0026
rows.name: ...What? SHE approached YOU?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0027
rows.name: Dammit, no! NO! I refuse to accept that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0030
rows.name:
It is always a joy and a pleasure to
speak to you, Himeri. Let me thank
you again for your wise counsel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0031
rows.name:
Might I invite you out again
today, perhaps? There's a matter
I'd love to get your input on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0032
rows.name:
Er, I'm sorry, but I'm on an important
mission today. I don't think I'd be
able to fit that into my schedule.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0033
rows.name:
But if you tell Ornela what's
troubling you, I promise to
arrange some time soon.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0034
rows.name:
It would be my deepest pleasure!
I await word of your availability
with bated breath.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Quentin about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0035
rows.name:
Lately, Himeri hasn't seemed to
be in very high spirits. I can't
imagine what's going on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0036
rows.name:
And Ornela seems to have disappeared
completely! I wonder what happened...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0037
rows.name:
Himeri has been such a huge help to
me. If she needs aid herself, I would
do anything for her. ...ANYTHING.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0038
rows.name:
Not that there's something a
nobody like me could do to help
an amazing person like her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0041
rows.name:
Oh, Himeri! It's you! I've been meaning
to talk to you because I haven't seen
Ornela around lately. Is everything okay?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0042
rows.name: O-Ornela? Well, I'm afraid she... Um...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0043
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0044
rows.name:
Oh no! Forgive me, Himeri! If it's
something difficult for you to talk
about, you don't need to tell me anything.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0045
rows.name:
I'm sure she's just...taking a long
vacation! Yes. That must be it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Quentin about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0046
rows.name:
I did a little hacking to help Himeri
find what she was looking for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0047
rows.name:
But my boss figured out what I'd done and
came down on me like a ton of bricks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0048
rows.name:
Fortunately, he owed Himeri a favor or two himself,
so when I told him why I'd done it, he said that
he would have done the same in my position.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0049
rows.name:
Himeri really is such an incredible
person. She's like the goddess of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0052
rows.name:
Say, Himeri? Do you ever
give advice to my...boss?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0053
rows.name:
I only ask because I brought you up the
other day, and he got very excited.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0054
rows.name:
Why yes, Quentin. After we spoke about
your working conditions, I went to your
boss in an effort to improve them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0055
rows.name:
He mentioned that he was having problems
with his Blue Blood, so I introduced him
to a good maintenance technician.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0056
rows.name:
Ah, that explains it! Thank you so much! My boss
is still stubborn, but we've been getting along
much better recently, and now I know why.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016802_MSG0057
rows.name:
I can't thank you enough. I really hope
we can talk like that again sometime.[ST:wait ]
